name: Exposure Routes
summary: Pulls users & groups (navi primary, Tenable MCP backup) split into paginated Users/Groups, tracks ownership COVERAGE (how much of the attack surface has an owner — an asset is 'closed' only when every route it sits on is owned), and maps exposure routes & paths to owners from plain English — tagging Owner:<group/user> on every asset on the matched route/path (gated).
